MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerks K. Shaw/C. Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Ricky Coleman, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.
Arnold W. Evje representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Alan Johns is present.
J.R. Gabbard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
